transparency.title: How We Work
transparency.subtitle: AI-assisted, source-based, transparent
transparency.description: All content on Bildungskompass is created with AI assistance and undergoes a three-stage validation model. Each piece of content carries a transparent status – from AI draft through editorial review to expert validation.
transparency.step1Desc: Content is created using AI based on scientific sources.
transparency.step2Desc: The editorial team reviews content for accuracy and clarity.
transparency.step3Desc: Subject matter experts from education research validate the recommendations.

footer.disclaimer: Bildungskompass uses AI to create content. All recommendations are based on scientific sources, which are linked. No content replaces professional advice.

methodik.title: Methodology
methodik.howWeWorkDesc: Bildungskompass uses a three-stage validation process to ensure transparency and quality.
methodik.evidenceShields: What do the Evidence Shields mean?
methodik.shield4: 4 Shields – Robust: Multiple high-quality randomized controlled trials (RCTs) consistently confirm the effect.
methodik.shield3: 3 Shields – Solid: At least one RCT or multiple quasi-experimental studies with consistent results.
methodik.shield2: 2 Shields – Emerging: Initial studies show promising results, but the evidence base is still narrow.
methodik.shield1: 1 Shield – Preliminary: Pilot studies or theoretical foundation, empirical verification still pending.
methodik.effectSizesDesc: We use Cohen's d or Hedges' g as measures of effect size. An effect of d = 0.2 is considered small, d = 0.5 moderate, and d = 0.8 large. Colored badges on topic cards indicate the effect.
methodik.whyAIDesc: We use AI because it enables us to quickly process large amounts of research literature and present it in a target-group-appropriate way. At the same time, we know: AI can make mistakes, overlook nuances, or misinterpret sources. That's why we transparently label which content has already been professionally reviewed – and which hasn't. Our goal is not perfection, but transparency.
